titles.text: Star Revenge 6.9: Luigi Lost in Time

descriptions.text:
Star Revenge 6.9: Luigi Lost in Time is a Rom Hack made by BroDute and released in 2015.

It is a small Hack with only 3 main courses and a few side courses.
There are 27 Stars in this Hack.

The Levels for this Hack were originally planned for Star Revenge 8 before Star Revenge 8 got reworked.
